title: Mini Ore Factories
description: All 1.21+ Mini Ore Miners in one data pack! Enjoy the unlimited minerals!
body:
# Mini Ore Factories
Welcome to Mini Ore Factories!

Want to make upgrading armor and tools easy? Or do you just want to flex the amounts of netherite and diamonds to your friends? Than this is the data pack for YOU!


<details>
<summary>Building Guide</summary>

**The base for all Mini Farms is built by placing a dropper facing up and putting an item frame on it's side.**

<details>
<summary>Mini Ore Factories</summary>

Put a netherite ingot/diamond/emerald/lapis/redstone dust/gold ingot/iron ingot/quartz/coal in the item frame and its matching block in top of the dropper.

![Mini Ore Miners](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8a79f9bbdd2f4a4bfa9d751f33c5bb4372fdfa5.png)

</details>
</details>
